response.reasoning: The role is Director-level IC (Principal Engineer) with 15 years required, focused on AI strategy, cloud/AI platform expertise, and advising strategic customers. Candidate has ~16 years total experience (since 2009/2010), meeting the minimum tenure. Strong full-stack and polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java), founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive. Current role at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — relevant but recent and limited. No advanced degree (preferred Master's/PhD in AI), no recognized AI products/platforms, no demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or operating at Principal/Director level. Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director. AI exposure is shallow relative to the bar for this role. Cloud experience exists (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but not at platform-strategy depth.
strengths: ~16 years polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of GISCollective — entrepreneurial, long-running open-source platform
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated Principal/Director-level scope or strategic advisory experience
AI depth is thin — no recognized AI products, platforms, or publications
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy footprint

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. Principal bar
Lack of Principal/Director-level leadership track record

response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with entrepreneurial experience and emerging AI-agent tooling exposure, but the résumé does not demonstrate the AI thought-leadership, platform-strategy scope, or Principal/Director-level influence required to advise strategic customers and shape future cloud/AI products. The gap between current trajectory and the role's bar is significant.
